props.label: 楼市真相
props.headline: 最好卖嘅 唔系上车盘 系四代住宅
props.enText: Zhongshan's Hottest Sellers Aren't ¥600K Starter Homes — They're ¥20K/sqm 4th-Gen Housing
props.subline: 六七十万上车盘 vs 成两万蚊一平方四代宅 · 你冇听错

props.label: 4.30新政满月
props.sublabel: 「好房子」网签 · 同比暴涨127.9% · 占全市成交额16% · 每6个买家就有1个拣四代宅
props.enLabel: Apr 30 New Policy — 1 Month: 196 'Good Homes' Sold, +127.9% YoY, 16% Market Share

props.label: 咩叫四代宅？
props.question: 你屋企可以有空中庭院？
props.answer: 简单讲：唔系窗台，唔系露台，系真系可以种花种草、摆张台饮茶嘅户外空间。使用率去到130%甚至145%——你买119平方，实际用到嘅面积等于旧式楼150平方。
props.enQuestion: Your Home Comes With a Sky Garden?
props.enAnswer: Simply put: not a bay window, not a balcony — a real outdoor space for plants and tea. Usable area reaches 130-145%: buy 119sqm, get the living space of an old-style 150sqm home.

props.label: 唔系叫你盲冲
props.title: 有啲四代宅 挂个名
props.enTitle: Some '4th-Gen' Homes Are Just a Label
props.desc: 实际使用率得110%，同普通楼冇分别。要睇发展商、睇位置、睇交楼标准。
props.enDesc: If the usable-area ratio is only 110%, it's just a regular home with a marketing label. Check the developer, location, and delivery standards.
bullets: 睇发展商过往交付记录
空中花园排水+承重必须验
